item.title: Democratic Republic of the Congo - Level 4: Do Not Travel
item.description: Do not travel to the Democratic Republic of the Congo due to crime, civil unrest, and armed conflict. Some areas have increased risk.

item.title: Nepal - Level 2: Exercise Increased Caution
item.description:
Exercise increased caution in Nepal due to the potential for political violence and natural disasters. Read the entire Travel Advisory.

Demonstrations and general strikes ("bandhs") can occur with little notice and may turn violent. Roads may be blocked and transport disrupted. Nepal is located in an active seismic zone and is prone to earthquakes and, during the monsoon season, to flooding and landslides. Trekking in remote and high-altitude areas carries additional risk; rescue services are limited.

item.title: France - Level 2: Exercise Increased Caution
item.description: Exercise increased caution in France due to terrorism and civil unrest.
